subject: science
skill_name: Changes caused by heating and cooling
question_text: Luke wants to make ice pops. First, he fills an ice pop mould with orange juice. What should Luke do now?
options: put the ice pop mould in the freezer
leave the ice pop mould on the counter
correct_answer: leave the ice pop mould on the counter

subject: science
skill_name: Identify mixtures
question_text: Select the mixture.

subject: science
skill_name: Identify pushes and pulls
question_text: A basketball player takes a shot. His hand pushes the ball into the air to score a basket. What is the direction of this push?
options: away from the basketball player's hand

subject: science
skill_name: How do mass and force affect motion?
question_text: Flynn gives two friends a ride in his wagon. One friend sits in the wagon at a time. Flynn starts to pull the wagon across the yard. To move the wagon at the same speed each time, which friend does Flynn need to pull with a larger force?

subject: science
skill_name: What objects can a magnet pull?
question_text: Abby is playing with a fishing game. She holds a toy fishing pole over a toy fish. Play the video to see what happens. Something went wrong An error occurred, please try again later. Copy for customer care: session ID undefined Try again Pick the true sentence.
options: The fishing pole pushes the fish.
The fishing pole pulls the fish.
correct_answer: The fishing pole pulls the fish.

subject: science
skill_name: Identify plants and animals
question_text: Select the animal.

subject: science
skill_name: Identify mammals, birds, fish, reptiles and amphibians
question_text: Reptiles have scaly, waterproof skin. Most reptiles live on land. An American alligator is an example of a reptile. Select the reptile below.

subject: science
skill_name: Identify animals with and without backbones
question_text: Select the animal that does not have a backbone. Hint: Insects, spiders, and worms do not have backbones.

subject: science
skill_name: Read animal life cycle diagrams
question_text: This picture is a diagram of a green sea turtle's life cycle. Select the stage that comes right after the egg stage. egg young sea turtle adult sea turtle adult dies Submit

subject: science
skill_name: Construct animal life cycle diagrams
question_text: This diagram shows a lion's life cycle. Put the missing stages into their places. adult dies adult lion cub young lion reproduction growth growth death Submit

subject: science
skill_name: Compare different animals' life cycles
question_text: These diagrams show the lion's life cycle and the brush rabbit's life cycle. cub young lion adult lion adult dies kit young rabbit adult rabbit adult dies Compare the two life cycles. Put each life cycle event into the correct column. Use the life cycle diagrams to help you. Some events might not belong in any column. lay eggs give birth to live offspring metamorphosis die grow lions only both lions and rabbits rabbits only Submit

subject: science
skill_name: Body parts and their functions
question_text: Which body part breaks down food?

subject: science
skill_name: Classify fruits and vegetables as plant parts
question_text: People use bamboo plants for food. We usually eat the part of this plant that holds the plant up. It carries food, water, and nutrients through the plant. Which part of the bamboo plant do we usually eat? Hint: A plant's stem holds the plant up. A plant's fruit protects its seeds.

subject: science
skill_name: Identify plant parts and their functions
question_text: Select the fruits. Submit

subject: science
skill_name: Read and construct flowering plant life cycle diagrams
question_text: This diagram shows a watermelon plant's life cycle. Select the stage that comes right after the seed stage. seed seedling adult plant adult grows flowers adult grows fruit adult dies Submit

subject: science
skill_name: How do flowering plants make new plants?
question_text: This drawing shows tomato seeds. What do seeds grow into?

subject: science
skill_name: Observe traits
question_text: This photograph shows a possum. possum Which traits does this possum have? Select all that apply. Possum It has dark-coloured eyes. It has a pink nose. It has two ears. It has black wings. Submit

subject: science
skill_name: Observe and compare traits
question_text: Look at the photographs below. angelfish dolphin Which of these traits does each animal have? Select all that apply. angelfish dolphin It has many spots. Its body is mostly grey. It can swim. It has a blowhole on its head. Submit

question_text: photograph of Saturn Saturn is the second largest planet in the solar system. It is a giant planet that is mostly made of gas. It has several large icy rings around it. Saturn is orbited by many moons. This diagram shows the Sun and planets in the solar system. Select Saturn. Submit
